publications.title: Meta-model for stress testing on blockchain nodes
publications.venue: 2020 3rd International Conference on Computing, Mathematics and Engineering Technologies (iCoMET)
publications.abstract: This paper presents a meta-model for stress testing blockchain nodes, providing a systematic approach to evaluate the performance and resilience of blockchain networks under various load conditions.

publications.title: An Approach of Usability Testing for Web User Interface Through Interaction Flow Modeling Language (IFML) Models
publications.venue: International Conference on Emerging Internetworking, Data & Web Technologies (EIDWT)
publications.abstract: This research proposes a novel approach for usability testing of web user interfaces by leveraging Interaction Flow Modeling Language (IFML) models to systematically evaluate and improve user experience.
